fields.$comment: Team-managed (simplified) Jira project. Epic-link uses the top-level `parent` field on createJiraIssue, NOT a customfield. Acceptance Criteria is embedded in description body — no separate AC custom field exposed on the create screen.

transitions.$comment: Resolved against AIEX-797 on first /jira run. AIEX is a 3-column workflow (To Do → In Progress → Done) with no `In Review` column — /review must map review-pass directly to Done and review-fail to In Progress.
